name: polymarket-price-canary
title: Polymarket Price Canary (Dry-Run Only)
description: Validates a small, fixed Polymarket condition manifest and builds the planned Gamma/CLOB request URLs (Gamma metadata, CLOB /prices-history, CLOB current-shape endpoints). Dry-run by default: zero network calls. A gated live-canary mode exists behind three explicit input flags (dry_run=false + live_canary_enabled=true + acknowledge_not_p1_evidence=true); any missing flag hard-stops before any request. See project_context/SPEC_apify_live_price_source_canary.md in rigolugo/pm_research for the full design and guardrail rationale.
